summary: DHH announces the upload of PDF slides from his 'Ruby on Rails, Take II' presentation. The slides expand on an earlier presentation with a closer look at Basecamp, its development process, and reception. They include code snippets showing the current state of the Rails framework. He notes the slides would pair better with the video recording, which isn't yet available.
key_points: The Take II presentation offered a deeper look at Basecamp as a Rails showcase
Code snippets in the slides reflected the then-current state of the Rails framework
Rails was being evangelized through conference presentations and real-world project demos
money_quotes: They're a bit more inclusive than the first presentation I did with a closer view at Basecamp, what we did, and how it was received.
key_insight: In its earliest days, Rails was promoted by showing how it powered a real product (Basecamp), grounding the framework's pitch in practical results rather than abstract features.
